author: Alexandre Stanislawski
subject: v1.11.6
body: ## [1.11.6](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.11.5...v1.11.6) (2017-04-20) ### Bug Fixes * **CONTRIBUTING:** remove section about beta releases (#2109) ([5640131](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/5640131)) * **sffv:** disable sffv input when few facet values FIX #2111 ([1e33c10](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/1e33c10)), closes [#2111](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2111)
